description: Classic, understated class in this dunhill Fresh fragrance for men from Dunhill. The top notes are basil, green notes and freesia, then blending into violet and orris, and finishing off with cedarwood, leather, amber, coumarin and patchouli.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
